project_type: Python FastAPI web application for digitizing rocketry flight cards using LLM vision models
build_system: pip (no requirements.txt - deps listed in Dockerfile), pnpm for JS assets
test_framework: pytest with hypothesis for property-based tests, located in tests/
verification_instructions: 1. Create .venv with Python 3.12 (pyenv shell 3.12.13 && python -m venv .venv). 2. Install deps. 3. Run pytest. 4. Optionally run docker build.
setup_instructions: pyenv shell 3.12.13 && python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install fastapi[standard] uvicorn[standard] 'sqlalchemy[asyncio]' aiosqlite httpx pydantic jinja2 Pillow rapidfuzz segno argon2-cffi itsdangerous pytest hypothesis boto3
environment_constraints: No .venv currently exists - must be created. pyenv has Python 3.12.13 available. Network is open for installing packages.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
key_patterns: EndpointConfig is a dataclass in config.py with url and concurrency fields. _parse_endpoint() parses JSON dicts into EndpointConfig. ExtractionService._worker() creates httpx.AsyncClient with base_url=endpoint.url and calls _call_ollama(). The endpoint_semaphores dict is keyed by ep.url. The event_manager passes app_config.extraction_endpoints to ExtractionService.
directory_structure: flight_card_scanner/ is the Python package with main.py, config.py, services/, routers/, etc. tests/ contains pytest test files. No requirements.txt - deps are only in the Dockerfile pip install line.
